templates.name: Support Case Filed
templates.template: Support case '{case_number}' (Severity {severity}) filed by '{customer_name}' for '{support_product_name}' on subscription '{azure_subscription_id}': '{title}'. Created: {created_date_time}. State: {state}.
templates.extracted_when: A support case exists in the dataset for the relevant time window, regardless of severity or escalation status.

templates.name: Critical Situation (CritSit)
templates.template: Support case '{case_number}' (Severity {severity}) for '{support_product_name}' is flagged as CritSit by '{customer_name}': '{title}'. Resource: {resource_uri}.
templates.extracted_when: The support case has IsCritSit set to True, indicating a critical situation escalation requiring urgent attention.

templates.name: Escalated Support Case
templates.template: Support case '{case_number}' for '{support_product_name}' was escalated (initial severity {initial_severity} -> current severity {severity}): '{title}'. Resource: {resource_uri}.
templates.extracted_when: The support case has IsEscalated set to True or the current Severity is higher (closer to A) than the InitialSeverity, indicating the issue worsened after filing.

templates.name: Multi-Case Same Product
templates.template: {case_count} support cases filed for '{support_product_name}' across subscriptions for customer '{customer_name}'. Cases: {case_numbers}. This pattern suggests a systemic product issue rather than an isolated incident.
templates.extracted_when: Multiple support cases exist for the same SupportProductName within the time window, indicating a recurring or widespread product issue.

templates.name: Multi-Customer Support Requests
templates.template: {customer_count} distinct customers have filed support cases for '{support_product_name}' in the last 4 hours: {customer_list}. Total cases: {total_case_count}. Max severity: {max_severity}. This cross-customer pattern indicates a widespread service problem rather than a customer-specific issue.
templates.extracted_when: Support cases from multiple distinct Customer_CloudCustomerName values exist for the same SupportProductName within the time window, indicating that the issue is not isolated to a single customer.
